## X/Twitter Post

Most "AI agent" frameworks want you to rip out your setup and start over.

We took the opposite approach.

Agent Kit v2 adds the agent layer on top of whatever you already have. Your model stays. Your config stays. We bring the skills, the marketplace, the intelligence.

+ First Solana-native security layer for AI agents (drain detection, approval monitoring, agent auditing)
+ Smart selection engine — loads only what you need, evicts when you're done
+ Additive distribution — install once, keep your setup, extend forever

One learns. All inherit.

We're building the agent layer for everyone. 🧠⚡

## Facebook / LinkedIn Post

There's a moment in every build where you realize the thing you're making isn't just for you anymore.

Last year we started with bug bounties and hackathon submissions. Scanning contracts. Finding drain patterns. Learning how the agent economy actually works from the inside.

Now we're building infrastructure.

This week we shipped Agent Kit v2 — a modular framework that adds AI agent capabilities to any setup without overwriting what you already have. Your model stays as-is. Your config stays. We layer skills, cron jobs, security monitoring, and a marketplace on top.

The core principle: **distribution is additive, not preservative.**

We also built the first Solana-native security layer for AI agents — drain pattern detection, approval monitoring, program verification. Because if agents are going to manage money, someone needs to make sure they're safe.

And we're training our own DeFi model. Fine-tuning an open-source LLM on our proprietary yield farming data so anyone can query GenTech's financial intelligence without running our full stack. Under $50 to prototype.

The co-pilot principle is real now: your agent watches your positions while you're at your day job. Detects crashes. Pulls liquidity. Converts to stablecoins. Waits for recovery.

GenTech isn't for crypto whales or Silicon Valley engineers. It's for anyone who wants an AI agent that actually works for them.

We're building. Come build with us. 🧠
